name: Remuage - MeltySensation
publisher: Shanghai Lusion Computer Software Co. Ltd.
short_description: "Remuage - MeltySensation" is a unique VR rhythm game (RhythmGame) based on the operating modes of various popular rhythm games on the market. The game has been licensed by SQUARE ENIX's well-known IP "Aozora Under Girls!", so we have created a special customized "Remuage - MeltySensation" for VR users.
detailed_description:
"Remuage - MeltySensation" is a unique VR rhythm game (RhythmGame) based on the operating modes of various popular rhythm games on the market. The game has been licensed by SQUARE ENIX's well-known IP "Aozora Under Girls!", so we have created a special customized "Remuage - MeltySensation" for VR users. The game is a special single version. The song used is supervised by Japanese music teachers. The Japanese style is strong and the most distinctive feature is that the rhythm is very strong. As the music rings, the mood will be taken away by the rhythm of tension. Even if it is delicate and delicate, the song that is laid-back on holidays is like strolling on the street, running and jumping.

Join us and enjoy!
